objects.query: SELECT Id, DeveloperName, SobjectType FROM RecordType WHERE SobjectType IN ('Section__c', 'DynamicLink__c')
SELECT Name, Size__c, Type__c FROM Icon__c ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Active__c, Name, Type__c FROM Page__c ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Active__c, Header__c, Name, Sub_Header__c, Video_Link__c, RecordTypeId, Icon__c, Page__c, Icon__r.Name, Page__r.Name FROM Section__c ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT App_API_Name__c, Filter_Name__c, Identity__c, Link__c, Name, Object__c, Page_Name__c, Relationship_API_Name__c, Relative_Url__c, Setup_Page__c, Site_Name__c, Text_Value__c, Where_Condition__c, RecordTypeId, Page__c, Section__c, Page__r.Name, Section__r.Name FROM DynamicLink__c ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT ActionText__c, Active__c, Description__c, Header__c, Name, Note__c, Sub_Header__c, Action__c, Icon__c, Action__r.Name, Icon__r.Name FROM Block__c ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Order_Sequence__c, Section__c, Block__c, Section__r.Name, Block__r.Name FROM SectionBlock__c ORDER BY Section__r.Name ASC, Block__r.Name ASC, Order_Sequence__c ASC
